name: @iap/planner
description: Deterministic planner for IaP (spec ch. 14, IEP-0011): nine-element determinism input vector with inputsHash, semantic diff of provider plans against state snapshots, closed lifecycle-action determination, wave scheduler, versioned risk rule table, rollback limitations and approval gates, ed25519 plan envelopes with injected expiry, PL-2 fail-closed invalidation, and canonical plan.iap.dev/v1 artifacts hashed to planId
